# Mineral absorption by roots

## Short Teaching Summary
Mineral absorption by roots: Minerals such as nitrate ions are absorbed by the roots of the plants to help make amino acids. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
